note: TILA amount-financed/finance-charge/total-of-payments tie-out fixtures vs a REAL art-332 (CC-A) amortization schedule output -- parity proof, not a reimplementation. Includes a tie-out-fail case, a dealer-markup-not-disclosed flag case, and a missing-provenance case.

dealer_participation.declaration_note: Dealer participation disclosed per contract Sec 4.
Dealer participation disclosed per contract Sec 4.
dealer_participation.disambiguation: This dealer-participation record is ASSERTED and receipt-bound only -- a fair-lending ADJACENCY note (dealer markup/reserve practices are a known ECOA/Reg B disparate-impact risk area), NOT a discrimination determination. No disparate-impact or disparate-treatment analysis is computed here.

output_payload.disambiguation: check_retail_installment_disclosures ties the declared cash-price/downpayment/prepaid-finance-charge inputs against a REUSED amortization schedule (art-332, and where TVM-derived, art-324..331) -- it does not compute or verify the amortization itself, and a wrong schedule_digest/totals yields a faithfully wrong tie-out.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR 1026.18(b)/(d)/(h) (Reg Z retail-installment TILA disclosures: amount financed, finance charge, total of payments) and 1026.18(d)(1)(i) (finance-charge tolerance).
